title: Data Analyst Intern
roles: Extensively researched Montessori teaching practices designed and published monthly parent-facing data reports using Figma, Tableau, and Python, providing parents and educators with resources to support children's learning

Presented data reports to an engaged non-technical audience in a webinar, translating data insights into accessible narratives, addressing any concerns, and fostering trust in the Montessori practices

title: Undergraduate Researcher (SURP)
roles: Executed a research study to analyze alignment of higher education curriculum and labor market demands, addressing key gaps in literature and helping students find best fit industry for their majors
Applied NLP data modeling and quantitative analysis to identify skill overlaps between course descriptions and job descriptions, gaining insights to curriculum alignment and career guidance decisions

Synthesized research findings into a comprehensive presentation and report, communicating results to peers and faculty and providing frameworks for future cross-national studies on curriculum-job alignment
